schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Akhil Bhartiya Sanskrit Shodh Sammelan” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Sanskrit Academy, Haridwar, under the Department of Sanskrit Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide a platform (Sanskrit Conference) for scholars, professors, lecturers, teachers, and students engaged in teaching, learning, and research to present their findings.
schemeContent.benefits_md: At the Sanskrit Shodh Sammelan, participants gain knowledge through new research in Sanskrit literature, exchange ideas, learn the methodology of writing research papers, and receive certificates.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a platform (Sanskrit Conference) for scholars, professors, lecturers, teachers, and students engaged in teaching, learning, and research to present their findings.

children.text: The scheme “Akhil Bhartiya Sanskrit Shodh Sammelan” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Sanskrit Academy, Haridwar, under the Department of Sanskrit Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide a platform (Sanskrit Conference) for scholars, professors, lecturers, teachers, and students engaged in teaching, learning, and research to present their findings.
At the Sanskrit Shodh Sammelan, participants gain knowledge through new research in Sanskrit literature, exchange ideas, learn the methodology of writing research papers, and receive certificates.

In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Academy, researchers must complete the application form and submit their research paper on the prescribed subject via email by the due date. Those whose papers are found eligible by the Research Paper Evaluation Committee will be invited to participate.

applicationProcess.process_md: In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Academy, researchers must complete the application form and submit their research paper on the prescribed subject via email by the due date. Those whose papers are found eligible by the Research Paper Evaluation Committee will be invited to participate.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. Acharyas, co-acharyas, assistant acharyas, lecturers, assistant professors, teachers, and research scholars from all states of the country who are engaged in study, teaching, or research are eligible to participate.

children.text: Acharyas, co-acharyas, assistant acharyas, lecturers, assistant professors, teachers, and research scholars from all states of the country who are engaged in study, teaching, or research are eligible to participate.
